name: joycode-proxy-cf
description: Cloudflare Pages + Functions edge port of JoyCodeProxy (protocol translator → JoyCode).

scripts.build:web: cd web && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b && node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build
scripts.dev: npm run build:web && wrangler pages dev ./web-build --local --compatibility-date 2026-06-01
scripts.pages:dev: npm run build:web && wrangler pages dev ./web-build --local --compatibility-date 2026-06-01
scripts.pages:deploy: npm run build:web && wrangler pages deploy ./web-build --project-name joycode-proxy
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute joycode-proxy-db --local --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute joycode-proxy-db --local --file=migrations/0002_keepalive_status.sql
scripts.db:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 execute joycode-proxy-db --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute joycode-proxy-db --file=migrations/0002_keepalive_status.sql
